name: claude-multiacct
tagline: Pool several Claude accounts in one Claude Desktop and switch the active login per Code session.
sellMe: Running more than one Anthropic subscription used to mean cloning Claude.app or re-signing the bundle. This pools every account inside a single Claude Desktop / Claude Code and switches the active login per Code-tab session from a picker mounted next to the model selector. An MV3 extension paints the picker in the Electron renderer, a Bearer-secured loopback daemon holds the account pool, and a CLI shim hot-swaps CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN between the real claude binary and each session's chosen account. It installs without patching or re-signing the app, applies on launch, and survives Claude updates.

products.name: cli-shim
products.description: Drop-in `claude` wrapper that resolves the session's chosen account and swaps CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN before exec'ing the real binary.

products.name: watcher
products.description: launchd agent that keeps the shim installed and re-applies it after Claude Desktop updates.

products.name: http-bridge
products.description: Loopback HTTP daemon (127.0.0.1, Bearer-secured) that holds the account pool and answers both the picker and the shim.

products.name: extension
products.description: MV3 extension injected into the renderer that paints the account picker next to the model selector.
